description: Case Style: Stainless steel circular case with digital display, 4 screw studs with red detailing around the dialStrap Style: Black strap with grooved detailing and  a tang closureFeatures: Digital display, date display, light to view in low light situations, stopwatch, mode button to activate different modes , four red press buttons to adjust settings, 2 mock buttons at the sidesWater resistant: 30 m
